underlying_goal: Fix and improve trial expiration reminder email system with proper design, data accuracy, and Hebrew language support
friction_detail: Multiple wrong approaches: switched between HTML/markdown/MJML incorrectly, used wrong relationship name (plan vs productPlan), created .blade.php instead of .mjml files
brief_summary: User wanted to fix and improve trial expiration emails; mostly achieved with working emails and proper data, though MJML implementation was interrupted.
